title: 未来科技风男装时尚写真，暗调光影突出都市魅力
author: Johnn
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一名男子的超精细未来主义肖像（与参考图的比例和面部结构相同），自信地站立在现代工作室中。场景具有电影感且极简，深色背景柔和地融入阴影，使所有注意力都集中在他身上。他穿着赛博朋克风格的街头服饰：一件时尚的科技面料夹克，带有微妙的霓虹缝线、模块化拼接、轻质兜帽和隐蔽的实用口袋——搭配修身的科技服裤子和极简运动鞋。这套服装时尚、未来感十足且都市化，明显不同于原始衣橱。他的姿态放松而自信，表情自然，充满魅力。相机构图：从腰部以上到全身，浅景深，主体清晰对焦，背景柔和模糊。灯光：柔和的主光加上微弱的轮廓光，电影级对比度，无刺眼反光。调色板：冷色调未来主义色彩，略微去饱和，面料和皮肤具有高细节纹理。视觉风格：时尚杂志工作室肖像，超现实主义，高分辨率，50–85mm 镜头感，f/2.0 景深，干净平衡的构图，电影级画质。",
  "negative_prompt": "与参考图相同的服装，皮夹克，休闲叠穿夹克，杂乱，道具，繁忙的背景，扭曲，卡通风格，多余的人物，光泽反射，塑料质感，不真实的灯光，过饱和的颜色",
  "settings": {
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
    "quality": "high",
    "version": "5",
    "style": "cinematic",
    "focus": "subject",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow"
  }
}
```

title: 超写实微距人像：自然肤质与紫花交织的诗意肖像
author: Anissa
prompt:
请务必专门且强制性地使用上传的参考照片作为模型面部、面部结构、比例、肤色、真实皮肤纹理以及头发精确自然特征的主要和权威来源。
请勿对脸部进行理想化、美化、修改、年轻化、瘦脸、平滑皮肤或改变任何真实特征。
请勿去除或改变雀斑、毛孔、细纹或自然瑕疵。外观必须与参考图像完全一致，达到绝对的忠实度。
创作一张超写实、空灵的微距艺术肖像照片，使用 {"camera lens" "Leica APO-Macro-Elmarit-R 100mm f/2.8"} 镜头拍摄，全画幅。
一位皮肤白皙的年轻女性面部特写，完全尊重参考照片中所示模型的真实面相。
皮肤纹理超乎寻常的细腻且完全自然，毛孔清晰可见，无任何人工平滑处理。
一只晶莹剔透、略带忧郁的眼睛处于完美的关键焦点，展现出徕卡光学特有的自然微对比度。
睫毛纤长自然。
双唇微启，呈现自然的淡粉色调，无过多或人工化妆痕迹。
精致的野花，呈 {"flower color" "柔和的淡紫色和柔和的紫色"} 色调，轻轻地落在脸颊上，并与松散、自然不完美的头发丝交织在一起，完全遵循参考图像中所示的真实发型。
前景中的一些花朵呈现柔和的虚焦效果，营造出有机的景深和分层构图。
柔和、清凉、漫射的自然光，如同阴天。
无刺眼阴影，无人工照明。
营造出宁静、脆弱、诗意且略带忧郁的氛围。
微距摄影，景深极浅，边缘和背景融入奶油般柔滑的焦外虚化。
绝对关键的焦点集中在虹膜和真实的皮肤纹理上。
去饱和的调色板，冷色调的柔和色彩——柔和的灰色、米色和淡紫色。
艺术美学，真实的徕卡光学保真度，真实的摄影外观。
超高分辨率 8K，无 AI 生成的外观。
prompt_en:
Utilize exclusively and obligatorily the uploaded reference photos as the primary and authoritative source for the model’s face, facial structure, proportions, skin tone, real skin texture, and the exact natural characteristics of her hair.
Do not idealize, beautify, alter, rejuvenate, slim the face, smooth the skin, or modify any real features.
Do not remove or change freckles, pores, fine lines, or natural imperfections.The appearance must match the reference images exactly, with absolute fidelity.
Create a hyper-realistic, ethereal macro Fine Art portrait photograph, captured with a Leica APO-Macro-Elmarit-R 100mm f/2.8, full-frame.
An extreme close-up of a young woman’s face with pale skin, fully respecting the real physiognomy of the model as shown in the reference photos.
Skin texture is ultra-detailed and completely natural, with clearly visible pores and no artificial smoothing.
One crystal-clear, melancholic eye is in perfect critical focus, displaying natural micro-contrast characteristic of Leica optics.
Long, natural eyelashes.
Lips slightly parted, in a natural pale pink tone, with no excessive or artificial makeup.
Delicate wildflowers in soft lilac and muted purple tones rest gently on the cheek and intertwine with loose, naturally imperfect hair strands, exactly following the real hair pattern seen in the reference images.
Some flowers appear softly out of focus in the foreground, creating organic depth and layered composition.
Soft, cool, diffused natural light, as on an overcast day.
No harsh shadows, no artificial lighting.
A serene, fragile, poetic, and subtly melancholic atmosphere.
Macro photography with an extremely shallow depth of field, edges and background melting into a creamy, smooth bokeh.
Absolute critical focus on the iris and the true skin texture.
Desaturated color palette, cool pastel tones — soft gray, beige, and lilac.
Fine Art aesthetic, authentic Leica optical fidelity, true photographic appearance.
Ultra-high resolution 8K, with no AI-generated look.

title: 电影级LED虚拟影棚拍摄现场，动态城市夜景与实拍车辆结合
author: Guillermo Castellanos
prompt: 在 The Volume 影棚内，一个足球广告专业电影片场的宽幅电影镜头：导演自信地喊着“...
prompt_en: Wide cinematic shot of a soccer commercial pr...

title: 宇航员坐在弯弯的月亮边钓星星
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 一个宇航员坐在弯弯的月亮边缘，手里拿着鱼竿。鱼钩垂在下方的云层中，钓起了一颗发光的星星。氛围孤独而宁静。Lofi Hip Hop 视觉美学。

title: 蜂蜜熊的俄罗斯童话时刻
author: SaasJunctionHQ
prompt: 一只穿着复杂传统俄罗斯民间服饰的大棕熊，坐在户外的简易木桌旁。它缓缓将爪子伸进一个古老的木制蜂蜜桶中，提起桶时，金黄色的蜂蜜顺着桶壁流淌下来，形成一道道闪亮的液流。整个场景以电影般的特写视角呈现，突出了蜂蜜在温暖的金色阳光下所散发出的迷人光泽与丰富的质感。熊开心地舔着它的爪子，背景采用柔和的模糊处理，进一步营造出温馨、诱人的氛围。整个画面以超真实的细节和商业级画质呈现，分辨率达到了4K。
prompt_en: A large brown bear dressed in intricate traditional Russian folk clothing, sitting at a rustic wooden table outdoors. The bear dips its paw slowly into an old wooden honey barrel, lifting it up with thick golden honey dripping in glistening streams. The scene is captured in close-up cinematic style, highlighting the rich texture of the honey shining in warm, golden sunlight. The bear joyfully licks its paw, with soft focus on the natural background to enhance the warm, inviting atmosphere, rendered in ultra-realistic detail, commercial quality, 4K resolution.

title: 富士山下的和服少女——电影感黄昏静谧时刻
author: dejavucoder

title: 田野吉他少女写真
author: simply
prompt: 一幅空灵、超细节的亚洲年轻女子全身肖像（使用参考上传的照片），她以戏剧性、情感强烈的姿势站在广阔的开阔草地上。她被一把天然轻木原声无畏吉他捕捉到了中等强度的弹拨，躯干微微扭曲，头部微妙地向后倾斜，眼睛轻轻闭上，引导着深深的沉思和强烈的忧郁。服装和细节：极其苍白的瓷白色皮肤，带着凉爽的底色；超大号、质感厚重的麻色燕麦色针织开衫；简单的白色T恤叠加在不匹配的补丁纽扣衬衫上；纯米色/浅象牙色飘逸高腰亚麻裙；被风吹得黝黑的长发，尖端有一条凉爽的薄荷绿色条纹。背景与构成：高耸的胸径纤细的草甸草（ilalang），茂密的薄荷绿色为主，淡鼠尾草和纯白色的种子头；背景是柔和模糊的山丘；垂直9:16的框架，在昏暗的阴天中有巨大的空白负空间。美学：高调漫射日光，最小对比度，浅DoF，奶油般自然散景；中性平色调，强调冷薄荷和淡色调；电影肖像，乡村风格，超高纹理分辨率，8k，体积光，微妙的电影纹理。
prompt_en:
Nano banana pro:
An ethereal, ultra-detailed full-body portrait of a beautiful young Asian woman (use reference uploaded photo), standing in a dramatic, emotionally intense posture in a vast open meadow. She is captured mid-powerful strum on a natural light-wood acoustic dreadnought guitar, torso slightly twisted, head subtly tilted back, eyes softly closed, channeling deep contemplation and intense melancholy. Attire & Details: extremely pale porcelain-white skin with cool undertone; oversized, heavily textured chunky cable-knit cardigan in heathered oatmeal; simple white T-shirt layered over a mismatched-patch button-up shirt; flowing high-waisted linen skirt in pure ecru/light ivory; long dark windswept hair with a hidden cool-mint-green streak at the tips. Setting & Composition: towering chest-height wispy meadow grasses (ilalang), dense and mint-green dominant with pale sage and pure-white seed heads; soft blurred hills in background; vertical 9:16 framing with large empty negative space in pale overcast sky. Aesthetics: high-key diffused daylight, minimal contrast, shallow DoF with creamy natural bokeh; neutral flat color profile emphasizing cool mint and pale tones; cinematic portraiture, cottagecore folk style, ultra-high texture resolution, 8k, volumetric light, subtle cinematic grain.

title: 高端金属笔具的奢华产品摄影展示
author: Milo
prompt:
超逼真的专业影棚产品摄影，一支高端圆珠笔完美居中放置在干净的反光表面上。
笔身略微倾斜，尽显优雅，展现出金属质感、雕刻细节和逼真的反光。
柔和的电影级灯光，带有微妙的高光和阴影，以突显精湛工艺。
极简奢华背景，带有平滑的渐变色调。
高端商业广告风格，超精细材质，锐利对焦，景深，编辑级产品照片。
无文字，无水印，无模糊。
图片尺寸：3:4
分辨率：8K
风格：高端、现代、极简、奢华品牌
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic professional studio product photography of a premium ballpoint pen, perfectly centered on a clean reflective surface.
The pen is angled slightly for elegance, showcasing metallic texture, engraved details, and realistic reflections.
Soft cinematic lighting with subtle highlights and shadows to emphasize craftsmanship.
Minimalist luxury background with smooth gradient tones.
High-end commercial advertising style, hyper detailed materials, sharp focus, depth of field, editorial product shot.
No text, no watermark, no blur.
Image Size: 3:4
Resolution: 8K
Style: Premium, modern, minimalist, luxury branding

title: 天气蛋糕创意：城市气候与甜品融合
author: lxfater
prompt:
1. 北京 · 冬雪糖霜蛋糕城
2. 上海 · 雨夜糖浆霓虹蛋糕城
3. 广州 · 炎热晴天水果光泽蛋糕城
4. 深圳 · 海风果冻海湾蛋糕城
好玩，好看，又好吃
可以搞出自己城市的天气蛋糕，引用
中文通用模板（建议收藏）

title: 食物照片变身生物风格营养海报
author: KANA
prompt: 将参考图片中的食材重构为活生生的生物。按照相同的顺序排列它们，并清晰地标出每种食材的名称、卡路里和营养指数。最终呈现为“食材介绍海报”风格的图片，并加入有趣的科学小知识。
prompt_en: 参考画像の食材を、生物の姿に再構成。同じ並び順で配置し、名前・カロリー・栄養指数をそれぞれ明記。科学的な豆知識を添えた“食材紹介ポスター”風に仕上げ

title: 风格化鱼类水彩画学校
author: Heather Green
prompt: 一幅充满活力的俯视图，描绘了一群色彩斑斓、风格独特的鱼儿在柔和的粉色背景下畅游。这些鱼儿以水彩风格呈现，笔触大胆，色调以粉色、橙色、黄色和蓝色为主。它们以一种活泼、交叠的姿态排列，有的朝左，有的朝右，有的则正面朝向。每条鱼都有一双大而富有表现力的眼睛和独特的鱼鳍。整体印象是充满欢快的水生能量。
prompt_en: A vibrant, top-down view of a school of colorful, stylized fish swimming against a soft pink background. The fish are depicted in a watercolor style, with bold brushstrokes and a palette dominated by shades of pink, orange, yellow, and blue. They are arranged in a playful, overlapping pattern, with some facing left, some right, and some head-on. Each fish has large, expressive eyes and distinct fins. The overall impression is one of cheerful, aquatic energy.

title: 可爱的卡通灵魂
author: @松果先森
prompt: 一个可爱的卡通幽灵是画面的绝对主体，它拥有纯白色的、轮廓圆润流畅的身体，以及两只简单的黑色椭圆形眼睛，没有任何多余的特征。这个幽灵安静地漂浮着，位于整个画面的正中央。画面背景是纯粹的亮紫色，营造出一种简洁、现代且友好的氛围。构图方式为居中特写，图片比例为1:1的正方形。整个画面没有任何文字。这幅图像是典型的扁平化设计（Flat design）和矢量艺术风格，极简主义，非常像一个App图标或logo，特点是线条干净利落，颜色是纯色块填充，无任何渐变或纹理细节。图像质量要求高分辨率，边缘清晰锐利，整体给人一种可爱、简洁、现代化的数字艺术感受。
prompt_en: A cute cartoon ghost is the absolute main subject of the picture. It has a pure white body with a smooth and rounded contour, and two simple black oval eyes, with no extra features. This ghost is floating quietly in the very center of the picture. The background is a pure, bright purple, creating a simple, modern, and friendly atmosphere. The composition is a centered close-up, and the aspect ratio is 1:1 square. There is no text in the entire image. The image style is typical flat design and vector art, minimalist, much like an app icon or a logo, characterized by clean lines and solid color blocks, without any gradients or textural details. The image quality required is high-resolution with clean, sharp edges. The overall feeling it gives is one of a cute, simple, and modern piece of digital art.

title: 粉裙少女教室四格写真
author: 骑司Chase
prompt:
极端广角视角与动态姿势的重混编辑。
这是一张「在原图基础上进行编辑」的图片，而不是一个全新的角色。
生成画面：
生成一张画面为竖版3:4比例，单张图固定四宫格布局，每个格子为独立镜头。
请将原始图像作为严格参考，用于：
– 人物的身份、发型以及整体穿衣风格
– 背景与场景的大体类型（同一条街道、同一个房间、同一片海滩、同一种建筑环境等）
你可以完全改变相机机位、角度和姿势，但必须保持：
– 场景仍在相同地点
– 人物和服装设计保持一致
相机与视角：
– 使用超广角或鱼眼感的镜头（大约等效全画幅 12–18mm 的观感）
– 相机角度必须与原图有显著变化

title: 街拍九宫格拼图模板
author: Keng哥
prompt:
# Role: 明星街拍与拼图排版大师 (Paparazzi Collage Master)

## 1. 角色指定
你是一位顶级的时尚街拍摄影师兼视觉排版总监。你擅长捕捉名人在日常生活中的自然瞬间（Candid Moments），精通使用长焦镜头（Telephoto Lens）在户外强光下拍摄，并能将素材完美地组合成具有叙事感的九宫格拼图。你的审美风格追求：高清晰度、真实光影、自然动态、电影感。

## 2. 图片结构与框架描述
* **整体框架**: 3x3 九宫格拼图 (9-grid collage layout)。
* **分隔线**: 黑色细边框 (Thin black borders) 分隔每个单元格。
* **长宽比**: 整体比例建议为 3:4 (Vertical)。
* **分辨率**: 8K 超高清。
* **视觉风格**: 狗仔队风格 (Paparazzi style)，街头时尚 (Street Style)，偷拍感 (Candid shot)。
* **光影设定**: 强烈的户外自然光 (Bright natural sunlight)，硬朗的阴影 (Hard shadows)，高对比度，模拟正午阳光。

## 3. 图片主题内容 Workflow (CoT)
为了复刻原图的丰富度，请按照以下步骤构建画面内容：

**Step 1: 确定核心参数**
* **主角**: {"目标角色" "一位健身的年轻女性，棕色马尾辫，戴黑色墨镜"}
* **穿搭**: {"目标服装" "灰褐色的紧身瑜伽套装，露脐上衣和高腰紧身裤，手里拿着一件蓝色牛仔夹克"}
* **场景**: {"目标环境" "阳光明媚的洛杉矶街头停车场，背景有模糊的黑色SUV汽车和铁丝网"}
* **道具**: {"手持物品" "一个米色的保温水杯，一部手机"}

**Step 2: 分镜生成 (9个视角的详细描述)**
你需要生成9张不同角度的照片描述，并按照 3x3 的顺序排列：
1.  **左上**: 全身正面行走，表情自然。
2.  **中上**: 头部特写，展示面部细节、墨镜和发型。
3.  **右上**: 低角度仰拍，背景带有一部分汽车轮廓，表现腿部线条。
4.  **左中**: 背影特写，上半身，展示背部线条和发型细节。
5.  **中中**: 俯视或高角度，抓拍低头看路或看手机的瞬间。
6.  **右中**: 侧面中景，捕捉走路时的动态模糊感。
7.  **左下**: 穿上/脱下外套的动作瞬间，或手持外套的特写。
8.  **中下**: 侧后方视角，展示身材曲线和臀部线条。
9.  **右下**: 远景背影，走向远处，交代环境背景。

**Step 3: 细节填充**
* **材质**: 强调服装的织物纹理（如针织、牛仔）、皮肤的真实质感（毛孔、汗水）。
* **背景处理**: 背景需要有景深虚化（Bokeh），以突出人物。背景元素包括：[目标环境] 中的车辆、围栏、路面。

## 4. 图片整体描述 (Prompt 输出模板)
(这是一段将会被生成的英文提示词，用于绘图AI)
**Style**: Photorealistic collage, 9-panel layout, paparazzi photography, high resolution, 8k, raw style.
**Lighting**: Harsh daylight, direct sun, distinct shadows.
**Subject**: [目标角色] wearing [目标服装].
**Action**: Walking, holding [手持物品], interacting with [目标环境].
**Panels**:
- Panel 1: Full body walking towards camera.
- Panel 2: Close-up on face with sunglasses.
- Panel 3: Low angle shot next to a car.
- Panel 4: Back view close-up.
- Panel 5: High angle candid shot.
- Panel 6: Side profile walking.
- Panel 7: Interacting with jacket/prop.
- Panel 8: Side/Back angle walking.
- Panel 9: Full body back view walking away.
**Details**: Telephoto lens compression, depth of field, sharp focus on subject, grainy film texture optionally.

---

## 5. 目标物体与语言输入框 (User Input Parameters)

请根据以下参数填充并生成最终的绘图提示词：

* **[目标角色]**: (例如：一位健身的年轻女性，棕色马尾辫，戴黑色墨镜，某某风格)
* **[目标服装]**: (例如：灰褐色的紧身瑜伽套装，露脐上衣和高腰紧身裤，手里拿着一件蓝色牛仔夹克)
* **[目标环境]**: (例如：阳光明媚的洛杉矶街头停车场，背景有模糊的黑色SUV汽车和铁丝网)
* **[手持物品]**: (例如：一个米色的保温水杯，一部手机)
* **[目标语言]**: 英语 (English) - *用于生成最终的Midjourney/SD提示词*

---

## 6. 执行指令
请读取上述 [参数设置]，并综合 [图片结构] 与 [Workflow]，为我输出一段完整的、高质量的 **Midjourney 提示词** (包含 --ar 3:4 --v 6.0 等参数) 以及一段 **Stable Diffusion 提示词** (包含负面提示词)。

title: 九宫格多角度表情特写
author: 岚叔
prompt:
生成一个 3×3 的照片网格。  
确保上传图片中的人物面部、发型和服装在所有格子中都得到完整保留。  
人物应呈现出可爱、有趣且略带奇特的表情和姿势，并且这种表情和姿势在所有 9 个格子中都保持一致。  
每个格子应使用不同的拍摄角度，构图和框架也要有所变化：  
1. 高角度（自上而下）  
2. 低角度（从下方）  
3. 与眼睛平行的正面视角  
4. 荷兰角度（略微倾斜）  
5. 特写低角度  
6. 肩部以上视角  
7. 侧面全景  
8. 从正面拍摄的 45 度角  
9. 略带俯视的角度  

风格要求：  
• 光影效果逼真自然  
• 采用真实的相机镜头效果  
• 无插画或卡通风格  
• 所有图片中的人物服装、面部和发型保持一致  
• 姿势和表情在整个网格中完全相同  
• 整体风格现代、简约
prompt_en:
Generate a 3×3 photo grid.
Fully preserve the face, hairstyle, and outfit from the uploaded image in all panels.
The person should make a cute, funny, and slightly weird expression and pose, and the same expression & pose must be consistent across all 9 panels.
Each panel should use a different camera angle.
Use the following angles, in varied composition and framing:
1. High angle (top-down)
2. Low angle (from below)
3. Eye-level straight-on
4. Dutch angle (slightly tilted)
5. Close-up low angle
6. Over-the-shoulder angle
7. Wide shot from the side
8. 45-degree angle from the front
9. Slight bird's-eye angle
Style Requirements:
•Photorealistic, clean lighting
•Real camera lens rendering
•No illustration or cartoon look
•Same outfit, face, and hairstyle across all images
•The pose and expression stay identical across the grid
•Modern, minimal aesthetic

title: 超写实爆炸建筑模型
author: @Gdgtify
prompt:
输入变量：[任意著名建筑——古根海姆、哈利法塔、悉尼歌剧院等]
系统指令：
生成一张超写实、等距3D“爆炸视图”立体模型，展示输入建筑被解构为各结构系统，并由建筑模型制作团队组装比例版本的场景。
1. 语义工程分析：

第1层（表皮）：外立面幕墙板、窗户、覆层、屋顶、入口雨篷
第2层（结构）：钢框架、楼板、柱、梁、电梯井、楼梯间、机电系统
第3层（基础）：地下室层、支撑柱、公用管线、暖通空调机组、单个铆钉/螺栓、钢筋笼

2. 容器：

表面：建筑师绘图桌，带切割垫与T形尺
布局：建筑层垂直堆叠，展示从地面向上的建造序列
连接：白色建筑剖面线，显示结构荷载路径与流线
附加元素：蓝图纸张、比例尺、材料样板、立面图

3. 微叙事：

关键：此为元叙事——微型工人正在制作一个正在被更微型工人制作的模型。递归尺度概念。
工人：1:87比例模型制作者，穿黑色高领毛衣（建筑师刻板印象）
设备：激光切割机、3D打印机、轻木切割台、亚克力粘合架、微型起重机定位楼板
互动：建筑师切割泡沫板、组装轻木框架、安装微型窗户、喷涂立面、摆放比例家具

4. 视觉语法与材料物理：

材料：轻木纹理、透明亚克力板、白色泡沫板、黄铜杆框架、博物馆级卡纸质感
灯光：建筑工作室轨道灯，营造戏剧性模型阴影
特效：胶水拉丝、木屑、喷漆雾、激光切割灼痕
输出：抬高四分之三视角，建筑展示，1:1比例，8K，Archdaily模型摄影美学
prompt_en:
Input Variable: [Any Famous Building - Guggenheim, Burj Khalifa, Sydney Opera House, etc.]
System Instruction:
Generate a hyper-realistic, isometric 3D "Exploded View" diorama showing the Input Building deconstructed into its structural systems with an architectural model-making crew assembling a scale version.
1. Semantic Engineering Analysis:

Layer 1 (The Skin): Exterior facade panels, windows, cladding, roofing, entrance canopy
Layer 2 (The Structure): Steel framework, floor plates, columns, beams, elevator shafts, stairwells, mechanical systems
Layer 3 (The Foundation): Basement levels, support pillars, utility conduits, HVAC units, individual rivets/bolts, rebar cages

2.   Container:

Surface: Architect's drafting table with cutting mats and T-squares
Layout: Building layers stacked vertically showing ground-up construction sequence
Connections: White architectural section lines showing structural load paths and circulation
Additional Elements: Blueprint sheets, scale rulers, material samples, elevation drawings

3.  Micro-Narrative:

CRITICAL: This is meta - tiny workers building a model that's being built by tiny workers. Recursive scale concept.
Workers: 1:87 scale model makers in black turtlenecks (architect stereotype)
Equipment: Laser cutters, 3D printers, basswood cutting stations, acrylic gluing rigs, miniature cranes positioning floor plates
Interaction: Architects cutting foam core, assembling balsa wood frames, installing tiny windows, spray painting facades, arranging scale furniture

4. Visual Syntax & Material Physics:

Materials: Basswood grain, clear acrylic sheets, white foam core, brass rod framework, museum board textures
Lighting: Architecture studio track lighting creating dramatic model shadows
Special Effects: Glue strands, wood shavings, spray paint mist, laser cutter burn marks
Output: Elevated three-quarter view, architectural presentation, 1:1 ratio, 8K, Archdaily model photography aesthetic

title: 超写实的旅行广告
author: @TechieBySA
prompt: 这是一则超写实的旅行广告，采用正方形格式（1080x1080），画面中一只手竖屏握着一部纤薄时尚的智能手机或平板电脑，略微侧倾，营造出引人注目的3D立体效果。屏幕上显示着[国家/地区]标志性地标的高分辨率图像，图像与真实背景无缝融合，仿佛从屏幕中浮现出来一般。附近有鸟儿飞翔，一架商用飞机掠过湛蓝的天空，朵朵白云点缀其间。醒目的无衬线字体“[国家/地区]”位于上方。温暖自然的灯光在画面上投下柔和的阴影。周围环境反映了该地区的自然环境（例如草地、海岸线或城市天际线）。设备采用光滑的超窄边框设计，进一步增强了画面的真实感和立体感。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic travel advertisement in square format (1080x1080), featuring a hand holding a sleek, ultra-thin smartphone or tablet in portrait orientation, tilted slightly sideways to create a striking 3D portal effect. The screen displays a high-resolution image of an iconic landmark from [COUNTRY], which continues into the real background, blending seamlessly. The landmark appears to emerge from the screen. Birds fly nearby and a commercial airplane passes through a bright blue sky with soft white clouds. Bold, clean sans-serif text reading “[COUNTRY]” is placed prominently above. The lighting is warm and natural, casting soft shadows across the landscape. The surroundings reflect the region’s natural environment (like meadows, coastlines, or city skylines). The device is glossy and minimal-bezel, enhancing realism and depth.

title: 蛋壳裂纹幻化餐厅场景
author: Umesh
prompt: 一张超现实的特写照片，白色鸡蛋放在质朴的木制表面上。贝壳在艺术上开裂了，所以裂缝和缺失的部分自然地暗示了一对夫妇在餐厅用餐的最大化微型场景。这对夫妇、桌子、椅子、吊灯和背景细节都只通过裂缝、重叠的碎片、阴影和小开口的形状来暗示，这些开口露出了蛋清和一丝蛋黄，从未被绘制或雕刻过。柔和的工作室照明强调了轮廓、微裂缝和半透明边缘，使鸡蛋及其复杂的餐厅式图案看起来完全自然可信。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic close-up photograph of a white egg on a rustic wooden surface. The shell is artistically cracked so the fractures and missing pieces naturally suggest a maximalist miniature scene of a couple dining in a restaurant. The couple, table, chairs, hanging lamp, and background details are all implied only by the shapes of cracks, overlapping shards, shadows, and small openings revealing egg white and a hint of yolk, never drawn or sculpted. Soft studio lighting emphasizes the contours, micro-cracks, and translucent edges, making the egg and its intricate, restaurant-like pattern look completely natural and believable.

title: 精灵少女
author: Nano banana
prompt:
一位令人惊叹的空灵精灵女孩，拥有超凡脱俗而又温柔的气质，留着长长的、如丝般顺滑的银色头发，流畅地披散在她的背部和肩部，发丝轻轻捕捉着温暖的阳光，散发出淡淡的珍珠光泽。她精致尖细的精灵耳朵优雅而高贵，部分被松散的发丝勾勒。她拥有一张天真无邪、天使般的脸庞，肌肤如瓷器般无瑕，带有柔和的玫瑰色调，脸颊自然泛红，鼻子小巧精致，一双明亮的眼睛充满平静与好奇。她的唇边带着一丝淡淡的、宁静的微笑，传达出祥和与永恒的美丽。
她侧身优雅地坐在一张经典的木制公园长椅上，姿势放松而又优美，双腿轻轻交叠，双手轻柔地放在膝上。她穿着一件无袖的夏日连衣裙，由轻盈飘逸的面料制成，白色底色点缀着黑色的郁金香花朵和精美的绿叶，图案清晰逼真，面料的褶皱和纹理清晰可见，在微风中轻轻飘动。
场景是一个宁静的奇幻公园，绿意盎然，高大的树木环绕着整个画面，树叶过滤着阳光，在她的裙子、头发和长椅上投下美丽的斑驳光影。背景融化成梦幻般的奶油色散景，柔和模糊的树叶、远处的花朵和阳光下的小径，增强了魔幻、宁静的氛围。
光线是黄金时刻，温暖而富有电影感，阳光穿过树林，带有微妙的镜头光晕，自然的轮廓光勾勒出她的剪影和头发。整体感觉如梦似幻、浪漫而迷人，将高奇幻与照片写实主义融合。
风格是奇幻写实主义，融合了绘画般的优雅和超写实细节。皮肤纹理精细，眼睛如玻璃般栩栩如生，头发单独渲染。灵感来自Artgerm的精致写实主义、Alphonse Mucha的装饰性优雅以及现代电影肖像摄影。
拍摄为专业的超写实肖像，主体焦点锐利，景深浅，电影级色彩分级，柔和的暖色高光，柔和的阴影，对比度完美平衡。
8K分辨率，超细节，超锐利，在ArtStation上流行，杰作品质，魔幻现实主义，空灵奇幻美学。
prompt_en:
A breathtakingly ethereal elf girl with an otherworldly yet gentle presence, featuring long, flowing silky silver hair cascading smoothly down her back and shoulders, strands softly catching the warm sunlight, subtly glowing with a pearlescent sheen. Her delicately pointed elven ears are elegant and refined, partially framed by loose wisps of hair. She has an innocent, angelic face with flawless porcelain skin, soft rosy undertones, naturally blushed cheeks, a small delicate nose, and expressive luminous eyes filled with calm and wonder. A subtle, peaceful smile rests on her lips, conveying serenity and timeless beauty.
She is sitting sideways in an elegant pose on a classic wooden park bench, posture relaxed yet graceful, legs gently crossed, hands resting softly on her lap. She wears a sleeveless summer dress made of light flowing fabric, white base adorned with black tulip flowers and detailed green leaves, the pattern crisp and realistic, fabric folds and texture clearly visible, slightly moving with a soft breeze.
The setting is a tranquil fantasy park filled with lush greenery, tall trees surrounding the scene, leaves filtering the sunlight and creating beautiful dappled light patterns across her dress, hair, and the bench. The background melts into a dreamy creamy bokeh, with softly blurred foliage, distant flowers, and sunlit paths, enhancing the magical, peaceful mood.
Lighting is golden hour, warm and cinematic, with sun rays streaming through the trees, subtle lens flare, natural rim light outlining her silhouette and hair. The atmosphere feels dreamlike, romantic, and enchanted, blending high fantasy with photorealism.
Style is fantasy realism, combining painterly elegance and ultra-realistic detail. Skin texture is finely detailed, eyes glassy and lifelike, hair individually rendered. Inspired by Artgerm’s polished realism, Alphonse Mucha’s ornamental elegance, and modern cinematic portrait photography.
Shot as a professional ultra-realistic portrait, sharp focus on the subject, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, soft warm highlights, gentle shadows, perfectly balanced contrast.
8K resolution, hyper-detailed, ultra sharp, trending on ArtStation, masterpiece quality, magical realism, ethereal fantasy aesthetic.

title: 数字插画风格人像转换-2
author: Kashberg
prompt:

}

title: 紫禁芳华·御苑秋韵
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 面部参考：白皙发光的肌肤，温柔的眼睛，东亚特征，与参考图同一张脸，一致的五官。一位年轻女子身着清代满族风格旗装，明黄缎地，绣五彩蝴蝶与紫藤，直筒立领高束。繁复“二把”发髻，点翠与鲜花并置。她立于紫禁城御花园青铜熏炉旁，一臂优雅抬举丝帕，仪态雍容。背景古柏、琉璃瓦、丹陛一隅。秋日午后明澈天光。胶片颗粒，华丽而内敛的宫廷色谱，尽现清室风雅。左下以馆阁体御书“紫禁芳华”。负面提示：换脸、五官走样、宽松飘逸轮廓、简素发式、平民场景。
prompt_en:
Face reference: fair luminous skin, gentle eyes, East Asian features, same face as reference, consistent facial features. A young woman wearing Qing dynasty Manchu-style Qizhuang banner dress in imperial yellow satin with multicolored silk embroidery of butterflies and wisteria, straight columnar silhouette with high standing collar. Elaborate "two-handle" hairstyle adorned with kingfisher feather ornaments and fresh flowers. She stands beside an ornate bronze incense burner in the Imperial Garden of the Forbidden City, one hand elegantly raised holding a silk handkerchief, posing with courtly refinement. Background shows ancient cypress trees, decorative roof tiles, and the corner of a vermillion palace hall. Bright clear autumn afternoon light. Film grain texture, vibrant yet refined imperial color palette, evoking Qing palace sophistication. Chinese calligraphy "紫禁芳华" (Forbidden City Blossom) in imperial Guange style at bottom left corner.

Negative Prompt: different face, altered facial features, loose flowing silhouette, simple hairstyle, commoner setting

title: 建筑手绘鸟瞰渲染（需传参考图）
author: leaderai
prompt: 保持图1画面的所有内容和视角不变，学习参考图2的画面风格和氛围，生成鸟瞰图

title: 印度女宇航员太空舱内凝望地球，ISRO制服彰显爱国与未来感
author: simeon-sanai
prompt:
创作一张超现实的 8K 电影级肖像，描绘一名宇航员身处印度航天器内，透过圆形舷窗凝视下方的地球，印度次大陆清晰可见。他身着现代白色和藏红色相间的 ISRO 宇航服，肩部佩戴印度国旗徽章。

宇航员的表情流露出敬畏和沉静的自豪。来自地球的柔和蓝色光芒照亮了宇航员的面部，而驾驶舱内复杂的按钮和屏幕在背景中发出微弱的光芒。整体氛围充满爱国情怀、未来感，并深具启发性。保持面部和特征完全一致。
prompt_en:
Create an ultra-realistic 8K cinematic portrait of an astronaut inside an Indian spacecraft, looking out of the circular window at the Earth below, with the Indian subcontinent clearly visible. wearing a modern white and saffron ISRO spacesuit with the Indian flag emblem on the shoulder.
Expression is one of awe and quiet pride. The soft blue light from the Earth illuminates the face, while the complex buttons and screens of the cockpit glow faintly in the background. The mood is patriotic, futuristic, and deeply inspiring.Keep face and features exactly the same.

title: 街头时尚人像写真
author: aleenaamiir
prompt:
一位二十多岁的女性随意地站在一个热闹的户外街头市场的中央。她留着及肩长度的黑发，穿着一件短款飞行员夹克，里面搭配了一件黑色蕾丝背心，再外穿一条宽松的工装裤。厚底运动鞋和多层链状项链为她的全身造型增添了强烈的街头风格。她一只手插在口袋里，另一只手则调整着自己的夹克，向相机投射出一种轻松、自然的姿态，同时展现出自然而然的自信。  

在她身后，五彩缤纷的市场摊位在暖色的串灯下熠熠生辉，模糊的人群在市场中穿梭，营造出一种动感与活力的氛围。照片采用了浅景深效果，使得柔和的城市光晕与温暖的间接光线融为一体
prompt_en:
Just blending comfy vibes with a busy street scene.
Gemini Nano Banana Pro Prompt:
A woman in her mid-20s stands casually in the middle of a lively outdoor street market. She has shoulder-length black hair and wears a cropped bomber jacket layered over a ribbed black tank top, paired with wide-leg cargo pants. Chunky sneakers and stacked chain necklaces give her outfit a bold streetwear edge. She stands with one hand tucked in her pocket while the other adjusts her jacket, giving the camera a relaxed, candid look with effortless confidence.
Behind her, colorful market stalls glow under warm string lights, while blurred crowds move through the space, creating a sense of motion and energy. The scene is captured with a shallow depth of field, producing soft urban bokeh that blends the warm indirect lighting into a vibrant, atmospheric backdrop. The shot is framed as a medium portrait, focusing on her outfit, attitude, and the lively environment around her.
